text.title: facebook-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for facebook-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Advantage+ Placements (automatic) when creative is only sized for feed (1:1 ratio).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automatic placements will show the ad in Stories (9:16) and Reels where a 1:1 creative is cropped, degrading performance and brand appearance.
